stemHtml: Under what circumstances may an ATC unit ask an aircraft to change its call sign?

options.a: It may request a temporary call sign change in the interest of safety when there is a risk of confusion with similar call signs.
options.b: It should never ask an aircraft to change its call sign.
options.c: It may not request a change after accepting the call sign with the flight plan.
options.d: It may require a permanent change only for aircraft on repetitive flight plans.
